Remove 'archive' from SKIP_DIRS if archival dirs need indexing."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index corruption risks all agent work built on false file assumptions.", "next_files_to_read": ["memory/swarm/code-index.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder in archive/ directory is skipped due to SKIP_DIRS including 'archive', preventing file discovery. Index is stale and empty despite recent timestamp.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/ into active packages/swarm/ and verify INDEXED_PATHS includes target directories. Remove 'archive' from SKIP_DIRS if archival dirs need indexing.

whistleblower_flag: Index corruption risks all agent work built on false file assumptions.
